name: Deepgram
author: TypeWhisper
description: Cloud transcription via Deepgram API with real-time WebSocket streaming. Requires API key.

descriptions.de: Cloud-Transkription ueber die Deepgram-API mit Echtzeit-WebSocket-Streaming. Erfordert API-Key.
descriptions.zh-Hans: 通过 Deepgram API 进行云端转录，支持实时 WebSocket 流式传输，需 API 密钥。
